reviews.review_msg: The most inspiring prof I've ever had. Even for REM 202 W, though it is difficult at times, I was motivated to become a better writer thanks to Scott. I recommend lots of repetition for getting through 202 and talking to Scott about any questions you have!  Very friendly and caring guy.
Best prof I've had, works very hard to support learning. Always willing to meet outside of class to help. Goes above and beyond.
Good man, but too difficult. Expectation too high.

ABSOULELY HATED 202W !!! but love scott shout out!! 202w destroyed my understanding of the english language. summary: class content is a bit confusing, lecture slides and handouts have so many colours it's hard to read, prof is amazing tho, glad to be out of this hellscape! one ‘paper', multiple assignments including in class writes
